name: Terminal Green
description: Black canvas, phosphor green text, monospace font. Hacker/developer aesthetic with CLI typing energy.

typography.note: All text is green on black. Use brightness/opacity for hierarchy — full #00ff41 for headlines, #2a7a3a for muted. Add blinking cursor (|) to animated elements for authenticity. Glow: text-shadow 0 0 10px rgba(0,255,65,0.8).

css.hed: font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; font-weight:700; font-size:100px; color:#00ff41; line-height:1.05; text-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(0,255,65,0.5);
css.capText: font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; font-size:32px; font-weight:400; color:#00ff41; text-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(0,255,65,0.8); padding:0 140px; line-height:1.4;
